questions.question: What is the main purpose of the email?
questions.explanation: The email clearly states confirmation of the scheduled appointment for next Tuesday.

questions.question: According to the passage, when will the new policy take effect?
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that the new policy will be implemented starting April 1st of this year.

questions.question: Which department is responsible for handling customer complaints?
questions.explanation: Customer complaints are typically handled by the Customer Service Department as stated in the company policy.
